title: Nevixity's Mod
description: a mod adding new ores, mobs and weapons
body:
this mod is focused around taming new mobs it has to offer as well as new weapon mechanics and exploring the end for the new ore called odium!

 you can tame capybaras with melons and breed them with pumpkins, 

and you can breed and tame redpandas with bamboo and apples

ps: the mod is still not done more updates coming soon!
